steps.t: An overlook of the refuge of Edhellond, west of Calembel in Belfalas, would be a good place to begin your stand against the Corsair raiders. Galengam …
Lathlorn is surveying the situation at Edhellond, from an overlook that provides a good view of the refuge.
Lathlorn has asked you to explore the abandoned refuge of Edhellond, defeating Corsair raiders and collecting any relics of historical interest.
Lathlorn is on an overlook with a good view of the Corsair landing at Edhellond. You have defeated Corsair raiders throughout Edhellond and collected …
